SEARCH

Uses of Enum Class
cpdt.common.enums.ProcessArea

Packages that use ProcessArea
Package
Description
cpdt.backend.controllers
Provides REST controllers for the Digital Twin backend.
cpdt.backend.repositories
Defines the data access layer for the Digital Twin backend.
cpdt.backend.services
Implements the business logic of the Digital Twin backend.
cpdt.backend.twin
Provides components for maintaining the Digital Twin state.
cpdt.common.dto
Provides the Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) used throughout the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.common.enums
Provides the enumerated types used throughout the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.common.models
Provides the core domain models used throughout the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.simulator.environment
Provides the environmental model used by the chemical plant simulator.
cpdt.simulator.scenarios
Provides simulation scenarios that introduce predefined operating conditions and events into the chemical plant simulation.

    Methods in cpdt.backend.controllers with parameters of type ProcessArea
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<TwinDeviceState>
    TwinController.getAreaState(ProcessArea processArea)
    Retrieves the current Digital Twin state for all devices within a specified process area.
    List<TelemetryEntity>
    TelemetryController.getAreaTelemetry(ProcessArea processArea, long since, int limit)
    Retrieves telemetry history for a process area.

    Method
    Description

    PlantEnvironment.getAllEnvironments()
    Returns an unmodifiable view of all process area environments.
    Methods in cpdt.simulator.environment with parameters of type ProcessArea
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ProcessAreaEnvironment
    PlantEnvironment.getProcessAreaEnvironment(ProcessArea processArea)
    Returns the environment associated with the specified process area.
    double
    PlantEnvironment.getValue(ProcessArea processArea, MeasurementType measurementType)
    Retrieves the current value of the specified environmental measurement from the given process area.
    void
    PlantEnvironment.setValue(ProcessArea processArea, MeasurementType measurementType, double value)
    Updates the value of a specific environmental measurement within the given process area.
    Constructors in cpdt.simulator.environment with parameters of type ProcessArea
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ProcessAreaEnvironment(ProcessArea processArea)
    Creates a new environment for the specified process area and initializes all supported measurements with their default values.
